description: Announcement of a family-oriented event or gathering with specific date, time, location, and festive atmosphere, designed to encourage community attendance and celebration.
structural_recipe: Post event details with emoji-enhanced visual hierarchy: vehicle/transportation reference, clear date (day + date + time range in 12-hour format), venue name with location descriptor, festive atmosphere descriptors, and call-to-action encouraging attendance. Use Arabic native numerals and Arabic language throughout. Include emoji that represent the event type or celebration mood.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to community-oriented events that center family gatherings and celebrations, especially during culturally significant times. Specific logistics (date, time, location) reduce friction for attendance. Festive framing and celebratory emoji align with values of shared joy and social belonging in Saudi culture.
transplantation_caveats: Event timing must respect prayer times and cultural calendar (avoid Ramadan prayer hours, align with local holidays)
Gender-mixed family events require appropriate framing in conservative contexts
Transportation references should reflect local infrastructure and cultural norms
Venue location descriptors should use recognized neighborhood names familiar to target audience
cultural_constraints: Must emphasize family-safe environment and activities
Avoid solo/dating framing; frame as community/family gathering
Time specifications should align with Saudi daily rhythms and seasonal patterns
